criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: 10 test failures remain across 3 files after Ralph's fixes. test_validation.py: 7 failures (compare_station_data called with wrong 3-arg pattern, str passed where df expected). test_pipeline_execution.py: 3 failures (imputation_report empty, not tracked in manifest, daily CSV artifacts missing 'rows' field). test_data_refresh.py: 2 failures (no hourly/daily processed files found). test_repo_shape.py: NOW PASSING (requirements.lock fix in 4ab16df worked). test_v2_pipeline.py and other files pass but some tests hang indefinitely (test_data_refresh, test_v2_pipeline serial tests).

failing_nodes.message: compare_station_data called with wrong 3-arg pattern (str, df, df). Function expects (ref_df, cmp_df, on=, value_cols=).
daily CSV manifest entries missing rows field

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: REJECT. Ralph's fixes partially addressed prior findings — test_repo_shape.py now passes (requirements.lock fix) and AC-E2E-7 passes (pseudo-station exclusion). However AC-E2E-8 still FAILS with 10 test failures across 3 files. test_validation.py has 7 failures from wrong function call signatures (unchanged from prior review). test_pipeline_execution.py has 3 failures from empty imputation_report and incomplete manifest schema (unchanged). test_data_refresh.py has 2 failures from missing processed output files. Total: 7 distinct failing nodes. Additionally, test suites in test_data_refresh.py and test_v2_pipeline.py hang when run with other tests, suggesting serial mark or long-running pipeline calls blocking parallel execution.
